# Tech Docs Instructions

Use this instruction set when the task is primarily about:

- technical documentation
- metadata-driven design notes
- mapping specifications
- source-to-target onboarding
- code-generation handoff context

Load in this order:

1. `skills/sap-fpsl-tech-docs/SKILL.md`
2. `skills/sap-fpsl-tech-docs/references/metadata-sources.md`
3. `skills/sap-fpsl-tech-docs/references/documentation-core-rules.md`
4. `skills/sap-fpsl-tech-docs/references/mapping-spec-rules.md` when the task is mapping-driven

Use normalized metadata first and keep confirmed, inferred, and unresolved mapping sections separate.
